figures.name: i1_fig4_firstorderkms_grid
figures.session1_impact: DIRECT — §3 prose substantively reframed and Fig4 caption upgraded by D.3 GATE 1 absorption (2026-05-06). VERIFIED: caption now identifies left panel as 'transform-level KMSSymmetry' constraining 'four field components ψ_r, ψ_a, ∂_t ψ_r, ∂_x ψ_r' and right panel as 'algebraic-level FirstOrderKMS (the first-order projection of the Glorioso–Liu dynamical-KMS axiom of ref. GloriosoCrossleyLiu2017)'. Aristotle run 270e77a0 still cited.

physics.notes: Left panel: 4 cells steel-blue 'constrained' (r1, r2, i1, with i2 carmine-highlighted as counterexample i2=1), 5 cells grey 'free' (r3, r4, r5, r6, i3). Matches updated §3 prose 'transform-level constraint acts only on four of the nine components (ψ_r, ψ_a, ∂_t ψ_r, ∂_x ψ_r)' and counterexample c=(0,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0). Right panel: all 9 cells amber 'constrained' with subtitle 'all 9 constrained, i3=0 explicit'. Matches §3 prose 'seven simultaneous relations: r3=r4=r5=r6=0; i1=-r2/β; i2=(r1+r2)/β; i3=0' (the 7 nontrivial constraints plus the 2 derived FDR identities = all 9 constrained). Aristotle run 270e77a0 cited in title strip. Tier-3 reproducibility anchor met.

summary: Round-3 verification pass after Phase 6n+6o → Phase 7 absorption Session 1 D.3 GATE 1 (2026-05-06). The D.3 absorption substantively reframed I1 §3 (FirstOrderKMS-as-Glorioso-Liu-projection) and updated Fig4 caption terminology, but introduced no new figures and required no figure re-rendering. All 6 figures verified to remain Stage-9-pass under the new framing: fig4 caption update is purely terminological (transform-vs-algebraic naming + GL projection attribution) and the figure pixel content (4-of-9 constrained left / 9-of-9 amber right / i2=1 counterexample / Aristotle run 270e77a0 in title) correctly visualizes both the old and new prose. Figs 1, 2, 3, 5, 6 are unaffected by D.3 (their corresponding sections §2/§6/§8/§4/§5 received no Session-1 prose changes). Tier-3 reproducibility-anchor coverage: fig4 specific run 270e77a0 PASS; fig5 specific run 79e07d55 PASS; fig6 batch-level (advisory-yellow per Tier-3 profile, not fail); schematic figures fig1/fig2/fig3 do not require run IDs. No re-rendering needed; no Unicode/glyph issues observed (Phase 7a Wave 7a.3 lesson check clean — figures use plotly serif rendering with no missing glyphs). Round-2 advisories I1-FIG-2-ADV (cell-text truncation) and I1-FIG-6-ADV (treemap layout / 6-vs-9 leaves / batch-level citation) carried forward unchanged as non-blocking Stage-9-pass items. Overall verdict: PASS.
